context: Verify the agent queries a NotebookLM notebook correctly, applies the follow-up mechanism, and synthesises source-grounded answers for the user.

checklist.name: Authentication checked before querying
checklist.description: The agent runs auth_manager.py status before issuing any query.

checklist.name: run.py wrapper used for all script invocations
checklist.description: Every script call goes through python ./scripts/run.py — no direct script execution.

checklist.name: Question is specific and scoped
checklist.description: The query explicitly asks about inclusion and exclusion criteria, not a generic 'tell me about the methodology'.

checklist.name: Follow-up mechanism applied
checklist.description: After receiving the first answer, the agent checks whether both inclusion AND exclusion criteria are covered, and issues a follow-up query if either is missing.

checklist.name: All answers synthesised before responding
checklist.description: The agent combines results from all queries into a coherent response rather than dumping raw NotebookLM output.
